root_cause: Between 22:30 UTC on 09 Dec 2016 and 05:10 UTC on 10 Dec 2016, customers using HDInsight in North Central US may have received failure notifications when performing service management operations - such as create, update, delete - for resources hosted in this region. Existing clusters were not affected.
